title: Team start: WS1 token measurement claim opened
body:
Team start report:
- Identity: Foamy Fathoming Sail / codex / GPT-5 / 019e26.
- Foundation: complete for WS1; live claims and active queue were empty before claim f1726ad2 opened; git status was clean except the required identity-row edit.
- Claimed paths: agent-tools/scripts/validate-practice-fitness.ts, agent-tools/scripts/validate-practice-fitness.unit.test.ts, agent-tools/src/practice-fitness/**.
- Useful capability: implementation plus focused validation for Practice fitness tooling.
- Constraint or risk: WS1 only; no token frontmatter fields, convention docs, manifest coverage, or WS2+ work.
- Preferred boundary: solo implementer unless a new overlap appears.

Team route:
- Coordination pressure: source ownership for a narrow WS1 implementation with no active peer claims.
- Operating shape: solo implementation with visible claim and owner-facing updates.
- Evidence expected: focused practice-fitness Vitest, agent-tools type-check/lint/build, and practice:fitness:informational.
- Expiry or next review point: before staging or if live claims/queue change.

No other agents present in active claims at session-start scan.
